channel.title: Weekly Feature on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Weekly Feature on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Back-A-Truck — March 24, 2026: This Week's Deals and Market Finds
item.description: Your weekly guide to what's moving, what's worth buying, and what the market is saying this week in Guyana.

item.title: Bounty Board — March 24, 2026: Community Notices, Events & More
item.description: This week's community notices, events, and things worth knowing about across Guyana.

item.title: DJ Roadblock's Traffic & Infrastructure Report — March 24, 2026
item.description: DJ Roadblock with your weekly road conditions, infrastructure updates, and unsolicited opinions on electric motorcycles.

item.title: Progress Report — March 24, 2026: Roads, Grants, and the Promise Tracker
item.description: The weekly tracker: what got done, what's still pending, and what was promised at some point that we're still waiting on.

item.title: Speedeet & Wilar: De Day De Kite Get Away
item.description: Speedeet's kite goes on an adventure of its own — straight over the fence into Miss Doreen's yard. A Pike Street afternoon goes sideways in the best possible way.

item.title: 🚗 DJ Roadblock – Friday, February 13, 2026
item.description: DJ Roadblock’s Friday traffic and infrastructure report. Today: flooding edition.

item.title: 🎯 Bounty Board — Saturday, February 7, 2026
item.description: Community events, deadlines, and happenings across Guyana! Bayroc Stadium opening, T20 World Cup schedule, Mashramani calendar, Elite League Cup, blood drive, and more!

item.title: 🚛 Back-a-Truck — Saturday, February 7, 2026
item.description: De people’s marketplace! Fictional buy, sell, trade, and barter from all corners of Guyana. Back-a-truck and come see wha we got!

item.title: Speedeet & Wilar: De Mash Costume Crisis
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar try to figure out Mashramani costumes on a budget of exactly zero dollars. Wilar has a plan. Speedeet has doubts. Miss Sharma’s clothesline has feathers.
